ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var inputTime = vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."dataTime" as Time var inputDate = vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."dataTime" as Date var inputZone = vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."dataTime" as TimeZone --- { "code": vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."code", "message": vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."message", "description": vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."description", "dataTime": inputDate ++ ' ' ++ inputTime as String {format: "HH:mm"} ++ ' ' ++ inputZone, "transactionId": vars.ERROR_MESSAGE."transactionId" }
